## Final checklist

- [ ] No secrets, API keys, or credentials were committed
- [ ] No datasets, videos, model weights, or other large assets were committed
- [ ] No unrelated changes are included (scope matches the issue)
- [ ] Documentation was updated where needed
- [ ] The issue requirements are satisfied
- [ ] The change is focused and ready for review
